mapper.sql: id, name, subtitle, singer_id, singer_name, category, tags, cover, audio_url, duration_seconds, language, intro, release_date, status, recommend_flag, play_count, like_count, favorite_count, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from song where id = #{id} limit 1

select from song where id in
#{id}
select from song where status = 'enabled' order by recommend_flag desc, play_count desc, favorite_count desc, update_time desc, id desc limit #{limit}
select from song where singer_id = #{singerId} and status = 'enabled' order by recommend_flag desc, play_count desc, favorite_count desc, update_time desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update song set name = #{name}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, singer_id = #{singerId}, singer_name = #{singerName}, category = #{category}, tags = #{tags}, cover = #{cover}, audio_url = #{audioUrl}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, language = #{language}, intro = #{intro}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, status = #{status}, recommend_flag = #{recommendFlag}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
